summary: Frontend testing for Dashboard Refonte (Executive Clean design). All 17 features tested and passed. The new dashboard layout includes: compact top bar with blue logo mark, 'IoT Asset Tracking' brand, period filter pills, datetime, refresh button; 4 KPI stat cards with large numbers and colored progress bars; split layout with Map (55%) + Alert Center (45%); 4-column bottom charts row (Activité, Répartition État, Statuts, Familles). Sidebar has modern styling with rounded menu items.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection errors and occasional 500 errors - external dependency, not a code issue

WebSocket connection errors to external API (omniyat.is-certified.com) - external dependency issue
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard Refonte (Executive Clean design) fully tested and working. All 17 features passed: login flow, compact top bar (blue logo mark, 'IoT Asset Tracking' brand, period filter pills Tout/Aujourd'hui/7j/30j/Dates, datetime, refresh button), 4 KPI stat cards with large numbers and colored progress bars, KPI card click opens detail panel, split layout (Map 55% + Alert Center 45%), Map card with 'Positions en temps réel' title, Alert Center with bell icon and 'Centre d'Alertes' title, 4 alert category items in 2x2 grid (Immobilisés, Batterie, Sous-utilisés, Tags off), settings panel with 3 threshold inputs, alert detail list toggle, 4-column bottom charts (Activité, Répartition État, Statuts, Familles), period filter switching, sidebar modern styling with rounded menu items, background #EEF1F5 light gray, cards white with rounded corners and shadows. External API (omniyat.is-certified.com) has slow response times (5-15s) and WebSocket errors - external dependency issue.
